name: ServerFileAttach
displayName: 服务器文件附件投递器
description: Registers whitelisted server-side files as standard chat attachments and exposes a guarded download route.
author: VCPstudio

ALLOWED_ATTACHMENT_ROOTS.description: Semicolon-separated absolute or project-relative directories that may be attached. Empty means deny all.

MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES.description: Maximum file size allowed for one attachment.

ATTACHMENT_CACHE_DIR.description: Directory used for the attachment index.

ATTACHMENT_HASH_ALGORITHM.description: Hash algorithm used for source integrity verification.

ALLOW_UNKNOWN_MIME.description: When true, unknown extensions are served as application/octet-stream.

ATTACHMENT_TTL_SECONDS.description: How long attachment records stay valid.

ATTACHMENT_DOWNLOAD_BASE_URL.description: Optional absolute URL prefix. Empty returns a relative /v1/attachments/:id URL.

SERVER_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRE_AUTH.description: Require Bearer auth or ?key= for downloads.

SERVER_ATTACHMENT_KEY.description: Download key. Defaults to global Key when omitted.

invocationCommands.description:
Register a whitelisted server file as a chat attachment.
Parameters:
- command: AttachFile
- filePath/sourcePath/src: required source file path or file:// URL.
- name: optional display name.
- disposition: optional, default download.
Example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」ServerFileAttach「末」,
command:「始」AttachFile「末」,
filePath:「始」file/report.pdf「末」,
name:「始」report.pdf「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

serviceRoutes.description: Download a registered attachment after auth and source integrity checks.
